notes: Active promoted lane: #1060-derived 11L/512d root with Gemma-style hybrid attention L,L,G,L,L,G,L,L,G,L,G, reserved-time full-Hessian GPTQ6 calibration, and the same prune-funded BigramHash 3072x112 upgrade.
purpose: Keep the #1060-derived base intact and spend the next architecture delta on a Gemma-style hybrid local/global attention schedule instead of another eval trick or full donor rewrite.

success_criteria: Beat the completed local #589-style reference baseline at 1.11956668 on final sliding_window_exact while staying under the 16,000,000-byte cap and keeping total train-plus-calibration wallclock inside 600 seconds.
